azurefox privesc

├────────┼──────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│high    │azurefox-lab-sp (current foothold)│current foothold direct control │current foothold    │Current foothold already has direct control.                    │Current foothold 'azurefox-lab-sp' already holds high-impact RBAC (Owner) on visible scope.│Check rbac for the exact assignment evidence and scope behind this current-identity escalation lead.│
│        │                                  │                                │                    │                                                                │                                                                                           │                                                                                                    │
│        │                                  │                                │                    │                                                                │AzureFox does not prove which exact abuse action is the best next step from this row alone.│                                                                                                    │
│medium  │azurefox-lab-sp (current foothold)│ingress-backed workload identity│ua-app via vm-web-01│Visible ingress-backed lead; not yet rooted in current foothold.│Public workload 'vm-web-01' carries identity 'ua-app' with high-impact RBAC (Owner).       │Check managed-identities for the workload-to-identity anchor behind this ingress-backed lead.       │
│        │                                  │                                │                    │                                                                │                                                                                           │                                                                                                    │
│        │                                  │                                │                    │                                                                │AzureFox does not prove control of the workload or successful token use from it.           │                                                                                                    │
╰────────┴──────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 2 privilege-escalation paths surfaced; 1 current-identity-rooted, 1 visible-only lead, 1 high, 1 medium.
